title: Costume reveal — living room before trick-or-treat
prompt:
Cast (Halloween costume night):
- @Sara: 7yo, FAIRY-PRINCESS COSTUME — silver tiara, pink-white ombre tutu w/ crystal bodice, glittery wings, fairy wand + jack-o-lantern bucket. Wavy dark-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Eva: 3yo, PUMPKIN-ONESIE COSTUME — round orange pumpkin body w/ jack-o-lantern face on tummy, green leaf-stem hat. Curly bright-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes — NOT olive, NOT brunette.
- @Mama: adult, COZY-CHAPERONE — burnt-orange knit beanie + cable-knit sweater, mustard pants, brown boots, kid-flashlight in hand. Blonde hair, fair skin.
- @Joe: fluffy cream-and-gold POMERANIAN dog in red-and-black LADYBUG body costume.
- @Ginger: JACK RUSSELL dog, white w/ tan ginger patches, tiny PUMPKIN-ORANGE CAPE.
Camera: slow dolly push, eye-level, opening medium-wide on the family fanned across the living-room rug. Establishing shot — first frame of the episode.
Scene: @front_house_fall living-room interior — paper jack-o-lanterns on side table, candy bowl on coffee table, warm orange floor-lamp glow.

0:0-0:2 — Slow dolly push, medium-wide eye-level. @Sara center-left, @Eva center-right, @Mama softly behind-center between the girls, @Joe sitting right-foreground at Eva's feet, @Ginger standing left-foreground at Sara's feet. Tails wagging. @Mama: "Are my pumpkins ready to trick-or-treat?"

0:2-0:4 — Hold. Rack focus pulls from the candy bowl in foreground onto @Sara's grin. @Sara lifts candy bucket a touch higher in a small in-place gesture. @Ginger does a tiny in-place zoomie-shimmy, all four paws on the rug.
0:4-0:6 — Slow push in to a softer medium on @Sara and @Eva. @Mama's smile widens. @Joe's tail wags. @Mama: "Let's go!"

0:6-0:8 — Slow pan right from @Sara across to @Eva at hip height, catching @Joe's bug-back wings glimmering in lamp light. @Eva does a tiny in-place wiggle of joy. @Sara: "YES! Trick or TREAT!" @Eva, looking down at @Joe: "Trick treat trick treat!"
0:8-1:0 — Slow pull back to opening medium-wide. Family settles into the portrait beat. Tails still wagging.

Lighting: warm pumpkin-orange floor-lamp glow, soft cinematic golden-hour interior.
Style: Pixar 3D feature-render, cinematic kid-show, NOT scary.
cameraStyle: slow dolly push from medium-wide, settles to portrait composition with a single rack focus and a slow pan right
closingFrame: Family fanned across the rug — @Sara center-left in fairy-princess tutu holding candy bucket at chest height, @Eva center-right in pumpkin onesie with bucket at hip height, @Mama softly behind-center smiling, @Joe sitting right-foreground in bug costume, @Ginger standing left-foreground in pumpkin cape with tail mid-wag, warm orange lamp glow.
